privileged_info_summary: The oilify task uses two real Unsplash photographs as primary data sources: photo-1506905925346-21bda4d32df4 and photo-1441974231531-c6227db76b6e (both 800x533 JPEG RGB images), with an 800x600 synthetic fallback image. The verification system evaluates oil painting effects through four criteria: edge reduction (≥40%), color variance reduction (≥30%), SSIM structural preservation (0.6-0.85 range), and pixel modification (≥30%), requiring 3/4 criteria for a 75% pass score. Thresholds are consistent with established image quality metrics and the mathematical properties of artistic smoothing filters.
